allow: Bash(python -m py_compile app/providers/sherpa_engine.py app/providers/sherpa.py app/providers/factory.py app/core/config.py tools/download_sherpa_models.py tools/record_stt.py)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Port 8000 in use by PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Stopped existing listener\(s\)." } else { Write-Output "Port 8000 free." })
